# Zyna UI

> Tailwind CSS component library and D3 chart Web Components by Binary Tech Ltd.
> MIT license. Framework-agnostic. Works in React, Vue, Svelte, Angular, Next.js, Nuxt, Astro, and plain HTML.

- Docs: https://zyna.dev
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/zynaui
- GitHub: https://github.com/binary-ly/zynaui

---

## Installation

```bash
npm install zynaui
```

### Tailwind v4 (CSS import)

```css
/* app.css */
@import "tailwindcss";
@plugin "zynaui";
```

With a class prefix:

```css
@import "tailwindcss";
@plugin "zynaui" {
  prefix: z-;
}
```

### Tailwind v3 (tailwind.config.js)

```js
module.exports = {
  plugins: [require('zynaui')()],
}
```

With a class prefix:

```js
module.exports = {
  plugins: [require('zynaui')({ prefix: 'z-' })],
}
```

### Plugin options

Only one option is available:

- `prefix` (string, default `''`): prepend a string to every ZynaUI class name to avoid collisions with other libraries. The dash must be included — e.g. `'z-'` produces `.z-btn`, `.z-badge`, `.z-card`, `.z-alert`.

### Plain HTML (no build system)

Link the compiled CSS directly:

```html
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://unpkg.com/zynaui/dist/zynaui.css" />
```

---

## UI Components

All components are pure CSS — no JavaScript required. Apply classes directly to HTML elements.

### Button

```html
<!-- Variants -->
<button class="btn btn-primary">Primary</button>
<button class="btn btn-secondary">Secondary</button>
<button class="btn btn-ghost">Ghost</button>
<button class="btn btn-danger">Danger</button>

<!-- Sizes -->
<button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm">Small</button>
<button class="btn btn-primary">Default</button>
<button class="btn btn-primary btn-lg">Large</button>

<!-- Icon-only (square clip shape, requires aria-label) -->
<button class="btn btn-primary btn-icon" aria-label="Add">
  <svg>...</svg>
</button>

<!-- Shape modifiers (combinable with any size) -->
<button class="btn btn-primary btn-cut">Diagonal cut corner</button>
<button class="btn btn-primary btn-bevel">Octagonal bevel</button>
<button class="btn btn-primary btn-round">Fully rounded</button>
<button class="btn btn-primary btn-square">Rectangular (no clip)</button>

<!-- States -->
<button class="btn btn-primary" disabled>Disabled</button>
<button class="btn btn-primary" aria-disabled="true">Aria disabled</button>

<!-- Non-button elements (also styled by .btn and [role="button"]) -->
<a role="button" class="btn btn-primary" href="#">Link styled as button</a>
```

**All button classes:** `btn`, `btn-primary`, `btn-secondary`, `btn-ghost`, `btn-danger`, `btn-sm`, `btn-lg`, `btn-icon`, `btn-cut`, `btn-bevel`, `btn-round`, `btn-square`

**Custom variant CSS token API:**
```css
.btn-custom {
  --btn-bg:                /* background */;
  --btn-color:             /* text colour */;
  --btn-filter:            /* resting drop-shadow/glow */;
  --btn-scan-color:        /* scan-sweep highlight colour */;
  --btn-hover-bg:          /* hover background (falls back to --btn-bg) */;
  --btn-hover-color:       /* hover text colour (falls back to --btn-color) */;
  --btn-hover-filter:      /* hover glow */;
  --btn-hover-text-shadow: /* hover text luminescence */;
  --btn-active-filter:     /* active-press filter */;
  --btn-focus-color:       /* focus-visible ring colour */;
  --btn-interior:          /* interior fill for outlined variants */;
  --btn-corner:            /* clip-path corner depth */;
}
```

---

### Badge

```html
<!-- Variants -->
<span class="badge badge-primary">Primary</span>
<span class="badge badge-secondary">Secondary</span>
<span class="badge badge-success">Success</span>
<span class="badge badge-warning">Warning</span>
<span class="badge badge-danger">Danger</span>
<span class="badge badge-info">Info</span>
<span class="badge badge-neutral">Neutral</span>
<span class="badge badge-outline">Outline</span>

<!-- Sizes -->
<span class="badge badge-primary badge-sm">Small</span>
<span class="badge badge-primary">Default</span>
<span class="badge badge-primary badge-lg">Large</span>

<!-- Pulse status dot (animated) -->
<span class="badge badge-success badge-pulse">Live</span>

<!-- Shape modifiers -->
<span class="badge badge-primary badge-slant">Slant (default parallelogram)</span>
<span class="badge badge-primary badge-rect">Rectangle</span>
<span class="badge badge-primary badge-pill">Pill</span>
<span class="badge badge-primary badge-bevel">Bevel (octagonal)</span>
```

**All badge classes:** `badge`, `badge-primary`, `badge-secondary`, `badge-success`, `badge-warning`, `badge-danger`, `badge-info`, `badge-neutral`, `badge-outline`, `badge-sm`, `badge-lg`, `badge-pulse`, `badge-slant`, `badge-rect`, `badge-pill`, `badge-bevel`

**Custom variant CSS token API:**
```css
.badge-custom {
  --badge-bg:         /* background tint */;
  --badge-color:      /* text colour */;
  --badge-glow:       /* drop-shadow filter */;
  --badge-scan-color: /* scan-sweep highlight */;
  --badge-interior:   /* interior fill for outlined variant */;
  --badge-offset:     /* parallelogram slant depth */;
}
```

---

### Card

```html
<div class="card">
  <div class="card-header">Header Label</div>
  <div class="card-body">
    <p class="card-title">Title</p>
    <p class="card-subtitle">Subtitle</p>
    <p>Body content.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="card-footer">
    <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm">Action</button>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Variants -->
<div class="card card-dark">...</div>   <!-- deeper background surface -->
<div class="card card-glow">...</div>   <!-- animated gold border pulse -->
<div class="card card-sm">...</div>     <!-- reduced padding throughout -->

<!-- Shape modifiers -->
<div class="card card-round">...</div>  <!-- large border-radius, no clip-path -->
<div class="card card-bevel">...</div>  <!-- octagonal bevel clip-path -->
```

**All card classes:** `card`, `card-dark`, `card-glow`, `card-sm`, `card-round`, `card-bevel`, `card-header`, `card-body`, `card-footer`, `card-title`, `card-subtitle`

**Custom variant CSS token API:**
```css
.card-custom {
  --card-gradient:      /* base colour gradient */;
  --card-border-color:  /* border colour */;
  --card-shadow:        /* box-shadow */;
  --card-bracket-color: /* corner L-bracket stroke colour */;
  --card-bracket-size:  /* corner bracket arm length (default: 20px) */;
  --card-bracket-stroke:/* corner bracket line thickness (default: 1.5px) */;
  --card-bar-gradient:  /* top power-bar gradient */;
  --card-glow-lo:       /* pulse glow colour at rest */;
  --card-glow-hi:       /* pulse glow colour at peak */;
  --card-animation:     /* CSS animation shorthand for glow pulse */;
}
```

---

### Alert

```html
<!-- Semantic variants — always include role="alert" for accessibility -->
<div class="alert alert-success" role="alert">
  <p class="alert-title">Success</p>
  <p>Changes saved.</p>
</div>
<div class="alert alert-danger" role="alert">...</div>
<div class="alert alert-warning" role="alert">...</div>
<div class="alert alert-info" role="alert">...</div>
<div class="alert alert-neutral" role="alert">...</div>
<div class="alert alert-dark" role="alert">...</div>

<!-- Sizes -->
<div class="alert alert-success alert-sm" role="alert">...</div>
<div class="alert alert-success alert-lg" role="alert">...</div>

<!-- Shape modifiers -->
<div class="alert alert-success alert-square" role="alert">...</div>
<div class="alert alert-success alert-round" role="alert">...</div>

<!-- Optional icon slot -->
<div class="alert alert-success" role="alert">
  <svg class="alert-icon">...</svg>
  <div>
    <p class="alert-title">Success</p>
    <p>Message here.</p>
  </div>
</div>
```

Note: `[role="alert"]` elements receive the same styles as `.alert` — no class required for correctly marked-up ARIA alerts.

The accent bar position (left vs top) is controlled by the active genre's structural tokens, not by user classes.

**All alert classes:** `alert`, `alert-success`, `alert-danger`, `alert-warning`, `alert-info`, `alert-neutral`, `alert-dark`, `alert-sm`, `alert-lg`, `alert-square`, `alert-round`, `alert-title`, `alert-icon`

**Custom variant CSS token API:**
```css
.alert-custom {
  --alert-bar-color:    /* accent bar colour */;
  --alert-bg:           /* background tint */;
  --alert-color:        /* text colour */;
  --alert-shadow:       /* box-shadow (near glow + inset depth) */;
  --alert-title-shadow: /* alert-title text-shadow luminescence */;
}
```

---

## D3 Chart Web Components

Import the charts bundle separately — it is not included in the default CSS-only build.

```js
import 'zynaui/charts'
```

Or load via CDN (IIFE, no bundler required):

```html
<script src="https://unpkg.com/zynaui/dist/zyna-charts.iife.js"></script>
```

All charts accept data as a JSON string attribute, are responsive (resize with their container via ResizeObserver), and support dark/light themes.

### `<zyna-waffle>`

Square-grid proportion chart. Best with total data values ≤ 100.

```html
<zyna-waffle
  data='[{"label":"A","value":40,"color":"#C9A84C"},{"label":"B","value":35,"color":"#009EDB","outline":true},{"label":"C","value":25,"color":"#00FFB2","outline":true}]'
  cols="10"
  gap="3"
  theme="dark"
/>
```

**Attributes:**
- `data` (required): JSON array of `{ label: string, value: number, color?: string, outline?: boolean }`
- `cols` (default: `"10"`): number of grid columns
- `gap` (default: `"3"`): gap between cells in px
- `color`: fallback cell colour when data item has no `color`
- `theme`: `"dark"` (default) or `"light"`
- `height`: explicit height in px; auto-derived from data when omitted

---

### `<zyna-timeline>`

Proportional-circle timeline — bubble area encodes value.

```html
<zyna-timeline
  data='[{"label":"2022","value":240},{"label":"2023","value":310,"note":"Launch"},{"label":"2024","value":450}]'
  highlight="2024"
  height="260"
/>
```

**Attributes:**
- `data` (required): JSON array of `{ label: string, value: number, note?: string }`
- `highlight`: label of the item to emphasize (default: highest-value item)
- `muted-color`: colour for non-highlighted items (default: `"#8A8478"`)
- `show-values`: `"false"` to hide value labels (default: `"true"`)
- `label-format`: D3 format string, e.g. `"$,.0f"`, `".1%"` (default: raw number)
- `height`: explicit height in px; auto-derived from width when omitted
- `color`: accent colour for the highlighted item
- `theme`: `"dark"` (default) or `"light"`

---

### `<zyna-nightingale>`

Nightingale/rose chart — polar bar chart where radius encodes value.

```html
<zyna-nightingale
  data='[{"label":"Design","value":520,"color":"#C9A84C"},{"label":"Engineering","value":380,"color":"#009EDB"}]'
  height="300"
/>
```

**Attributes:**
- `data` (required): JSON array of `{ label: string, value: number, color?: string }`
- `height`: explicit height in px
- `theme`: `"dark"` (default) or `"light"`
- `label-format`: D3 format string

---

### `<zyna-lollipop>`

Horizontal lollipop chart — line + circle encodes value.

```html
<zyna-lollipop
  data='[{"label":"London","value":920},{"label":"Dubai","value":340},{"label":"Berlin","value":210}]'
  highlight="London"
  height="260"
/>
```

**Attributes:**
- `data` (required): JSON array of `{ label: string, value: number }` (sort descending for best layout)
- `highlight`: label of the item to accent (default: first item)
- `muted-color`: colour for non-highlighted stems and labels
- `show-values`: `"false"` to hide value labels (default: `"true"`)
- `label-format`: D3 format string
- `ticks`: number of x-axis tick marks (default: `"5"`)
- `height`: explicit height in px; auto-derived from data length when omitted
- `color`: accent colour
- `theme`: `"dark"` (default) or `"light"`

---

### `<zyna-orbital>`

Concentric ring chart — each ring encodes a proportion (0–1).

```html
<zyna-orbital
  data='[{"label":"Done","value":0.48},{"label":"In Progress","value":0.29},{"label":"Review","value":0.15},{"label":"Blocked","value":0.08}]'
  height="300"
/>
```

**Attributes:**
- `data` (required): JSON array of `{ label: string, value: number }` where `value` is between 0 and 1
- `height`: explicit height in px
- `color`: accent colour
- `theme`: `"dark"` (default) or `"light"`

---

### `<zyna-candlestick>`

OHLC candlestick chart for time-series price data. Bullish candles (close ≥ open) use the genre brand colour; bearish candles use `bear-color`.

```html
<zyna-candlestick
  data='[
    { "date": "Apr 1", "open": 100, "high": 104, "low": 97,  "close": 103 },
    { "date": "Apr 2", "open": 103, "high": 107, "low": 102, "close": 106 },
    { "date": "Apr 3", "open": 106, "high": 108, "low": 101, "close": 102 }
  ]'
  label-format="$,.0f"
></zyna-candlestick>
```

**Attributes:**
- `data` (required): JSON array of `{ date, open, high, low, close }` in chronological order
- `color`: bullish candle colour (defaults to genre brand)
- `bear-color` (default: `"#B03A2E"`): bearish candle colour
- `show-axis` (default: `"true"`): set `"false"` to hide axis ticks and labels
- `label-format`: D3 number format for y-axis labels (e.g. `"$,.0f"`)
- `ticks` (default: `"5"`): approximate y-axis tick count
- `height`: explicit height in px; auto-derived from width when omitted
- `theme`: `"dark"` (default) or `"light"`

---

### `<zyna-gauge>`

Segmented arc gauge for a single reading against a min/max range. Zones past the marker dim automatically so the up-to-here reading is clear.

```html
<zyna-gauge
  value="64" min="0" max="100"
  zones='[
    { "from": 0,  "to": 30,  "color": "#11864f", "label": "Low" },
    { "from": 30, "to": 60,  "color": "#f1c40f", "label": "Medium" },
    { "from": 60, "to": 80,  "color": "#e67e22", "label": "High" },
    { "from": 80, "to": 100, "color": "#e74c3c", "label": "Critical" }
  ]'
></zyna-gauge>
```

**Attributes:**
- `value` (required): current reading; clamped to `[min, max]`
- `min` (default: `"0"`), `max` (default: `"100"`): range bounds
- `zones` (required): JSON array of `{ from, to, color, label? }`
- `arc-degrees` (default: `"180"`): total arc sweep in degrees
- `start-label`, `end-label`: optional labels at the arc ends
- `label`: static caption override (defaults to active zone's label)
- `label-format`: D3 number format for the centre value (e.g. `".1%"`)
- `thickness`: arc thickness in px (scales with radius when omitted)
- `dim-opacity` (default: `"0.35"`): opacity of zones past the marker
- `height`: explicit height in px
- `theme`: `"dark"` (default) or `"light"`

---

### `<zyna-line>`

Multi-series area-line chart. Each series gets its own line and filled region; fills stack between adjacent series for a layered depth effect.

```html
<zyna-line
  data='[
    { "label": "Revenue", "values": [
      { "x": "Jan", "y": 312 }, { "x": "Feb", "y": 298 },
      { "x": "Mar", "y": 341 }, { "x": "Apr", "y": 367 }
    ]},
    { "label": "Target", "color": "#4BBFA8", "values": [
      { "x": "Jan", "y": 300 }, { "x": "Feb", "y": 310 },
      { "x": "Mar", "y": 320 }, { "x": "Apr", "y": 340 }
    ]}
  ]'
  annotations='[{ "series": 0, "x": "Apr", "label": "Peak", "direction": "up" }]'
  tension="0.4"
></zyna-line>
```

**Attributes:**
- `data` (required): JSON array of `{ label?, color?, values: [{ x, y }] }`. Pass `x: ""` on intermediate points to suppress crowded x-axis labels.
- `annotations`: JSON array of `{ series, x, label?, direction? }` where `direction` is `"up"` or `"down"`
- `tension` (default: `"0"`): curve smoothing — `0` = straight lines, `1` = maximum Catmull-Rom
- `y-min`, `y-max`: explicit y-axis bounds (auto when omitted)
- `ticks` (default: `"4"`): y-axis tick count
- `height`: explicit height in px
- `theme`: `"dark"` (default) or `"light"`

---

## Theming (Genres)

Zyna UI ships with two built-in themes called "genres":

- **Ops** (default): gold military HUD aesthetic (`--zyna: #C9A84C`)
- **Cyberpunk**: acid green terminal aesthetic (`--zyna: #39FF14`)

### Activate a genre via CSS (no JavaScript)

Set `data-genre` on the `<html>` element:

```html
<html data-genre="cyberpunk">
```

### Activate a genre via JavaScript at runtime

```js
document.documentElement.dataset.genre = 'cyberpunk'
```

### Define a custom genre

```js
import { defineGenre, registerGenre } from 'zynaui/genres'

const aurora = defineGenre({
  name: 'Aurora',
  // palette: preview swatches for genre-switcher UIs
  palette: { brand: '#BF5FFF' },
  // tokens: CSS custom properties set on <html> at runtime via JS
  tokens: {
    '--zyna':      '#BF5FFF',
    '--zyna-dark': '#7A3DA0',
  },
  // styles: structural overrides scoped to html[data-genre="aurora"]
  // Use this for changing clip-path shapes, badge geometry, bar positions, etc.
  styles: {
    'html[data-genre="aurora"]': {
      '--z-btn-clip':   'inset(0)',           // rectangular buttons
      '--z-badge-clip': 'inset(0 round 4px)', // pill-ish badges
    },
  },
})

registerGenre(aurora)

// Activate:
document.documentElement.dataset.genre = 'aurora'
```

`defineGenre` accepts an optional `extends` property to base your genre on an existing one (defaults to Ops).

---

## React / Next.js — Chart Wrappers

The `zynaui/react` export provides typed React wrapper components for the **chart Web Components only**. These handle SSR safety (no `HTMLElement` reference at import time) and accept native JS values instead of JSON strings.

```tsx
import { ZynaWaffle, ZynaTimeline, ZynaNightingale, ZynaLollipop, ZynaOrbital, ZynaCandlestick, ZynaGauge, ZynaLine } from 'zynaui/react'

// The 'use client' directive is included in the package.
// Works with Next.js App Router without extra setup.

export default function Dashboard() {
  return (
    <ZynaWaffle
      data={[
        { label: 'Food', value: 35, color: '#C9A84C' },
        { label: 'Shelter', value: 25, color: '#009EDB', outline: true },
      ]}
      cols={10}
      gap={3}
    />
  )
}
```

UI components (Button, Badge, Card, Alert) are pure CSS — use their class names directly in JSX. No React wrappers are needed or provided for them.

---

## Tailwind Theme Extension

The plugin extends the Tailwind theme with semantic color and radius tokens:

```html
<!-- Semantic status colours -->
<p class="text-zyna-success">Online</p>
<p class="text-zyna-danger">Error</p>
<p class="text-zyna-warning">Warning</p>
<p class="text-zyna-info">Info</p>
<p class="text-zyna">Brand gold</p>
<p class="text-zyna-muted">Muted text</p>

<!-- Corner radius tokens -->
<div class="rounded-zyna-sm">...</div>
<div class="rounded-zyna">...</div>
<div class="rounded-zyna-lg">...</div>
<div class="rounded-zyna-xl">...</div>
```

---

## TypeScript

The package ships TypeScript types. The plugin options type:

```ts
import type { ZynaUIOptions } from 'zynaui'
// ZynaUIOptions = { prefix?: string }
```

---

- Nightingale chart: https://zyna.dev/charts/nightingale/
